name: Phantasmal Martyrs
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>殉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>教</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: While you have at least 2 other cards in your hand, and control "Uria, Lord of Searing Flames" or "Hamon, Lord of Striking Thunder": Send your entire hand to the GY; Special Summon 3 "Phantasmal Martyr Tokens" (Fiend/DARK/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Attack Position.
eff: While you have at least 2 other cards in your hand, and control "Uria, Lord of Searing Flames" or "Hamon, Lord of Striking Thunder": Send your entire hand to the GY; Special Summon 3 "Phantasmal Martyr Tokens" (Fiend/DARK/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Attack Position.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
